x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Sufficient change history allows Now Assist to learn risk patterns, generate accurate change summaries, and provide AI-assisted risk assessments grounded in historical data.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Allow change record volume to accumulate before enabling Now Assist change risk assessment features. Focus on data quality: descriptions, CI association, and closure notes. Target: 500+ change requests in the trailing 12 months.
